source.title: Cafe Dostoyevsky Cocktail Window Execute - 5-Stack Ranked Replay Breakdown (Ying/Sens/Gridlock/Amaru/Nomad)
source.notes: Auto-generated captions (ASR). This video walks through exactly one attack plan (a 5-stack execute through the cocktail window on the top-floor site) using a match replay from the presenter's stream, rather than a full map guide across all sites — so this file only covers that one site/plan. ASR renders 'Sens' as 'sense'/'sc', 'Amaru' as 'amaru'/'a Maru', and 'Ying' as 'ying' throughout — these are all real Attack operators and match context (light sensors/roll sensor wall = Sens; grapple/vault = Amaru; Candela = Ying) so they're used as-is. Defender operators named in the replay (Valkyrie, Mute, Kapkan, Warden, Vigil) are opponents, not attack picks, and are only referenced for context, not listed as recommendations in this Attack file. Compass grounding: Ubisoft's official blueprint zip for this map (same source used for Bank) contains only unlabeled, low-resolution floor overlays with no compass rose or room labels legible at the available resolution, so compass directions could not be reliably assigned for this file — locations below are room/feature names only.

gadgetPlacements.note: Repel up to the cocktail window, smoke off the double door, fire multiple Candelas into the cocktail area along the main sightline plus at least one Candela into the hallway beyond. Repel in and plant in the corner by the bomb.
Place an Air Jab Launcher trap on the pillar door.

gadgetPlacements.location: White stairs window, AT THE BOTTOM of the window frame
gadgetPlacements.note: Second Air Jab trap, placed low. The Air Jab only triggers on landing, not mid-fall — place it at the base of the window, not the top.
Repel up to the cocktail window and hold a tight angle through cocktail once everyone else is in position.
Pre-prime, unarmed, then activate a roll sensor down through the skylight to cut the cocktail sightline from roughly mid-room to the back.

gadgetPlacements.location: Cocktail window (after the sensor curtain is up)
gadgetPlacements.note: After throwing the roll sensor, stay on the skylight or repel to the cocktail window to hold and control it.
Open the roof hatches early to sell a normal push.

gadgetPlacements.location: Skylight, into freezer doors / bar storage doors / down onto cocktail
gadgetPlacements.note: Throw Trax Traps through the skylight toward the freezer doors and bar storage doors, and down onto cocktail.
Additional Trax Traps through the doors in this area for noise.

gadgetPlacements.location: Heaven Balcony or White Stairs window
gadgetPlacements.note: Repel in once the plant is starting (after Ying's Candelas and the smoke are down). Normally through Heaven Balcony/window; White Stairs window also works. Push down cocktail or hold from Heaven balcony.

operatorRecommendations.note: Leads the execute: smoke + Candela spam into cocktail, repel in, plant in the corner by the bomb (or on top of the cocktail desk near B1/B2 as an alternative plant spot).
Roll sensor curtain through the skylight blinds any defender watching down the cocktail sightline, including cameras. Can hold cocktail window afterward.
Opens hatches to sell a normal push, then spams Trax Traps through the skylight and nearby doors for noise and denial.
Repels through Heaven Balcony (or White Stairs window) once the plant starts, to deny defenders pushing the plant.
Air Jab traps on pillar door and the base of the white stairs window stop defenders running out or repelling to contest; then holds the cocktail window angle.

generalTips.note: Works with as few as 2-3 players, 5 is ideal — drop Gridlock's noise/distraction role first if short-handed.
Concept adapts to other window setups — video mentions CCTV on Club House and Kitchen-equivalent windows on other maps.
Once the plant is down with two attackers still on repel outside (cocktail window + heaven/white stairs), the round becomes very hard for defenders to win.

Alternative plant spot: standing on top of the cocktail desk keeps the planter hidden from every defender angle, at the cost of exposure if a defender walks through the first sensor curtain near that spot.
Watch for a defender playing Pulse below, a defender blind-C4ing into cocktail, or a defender holding the corridor door to peek/deny.
